label: complaint

text: The agent I spoke to was rude and did not solve my problem.
label: complaint

text: I keep reporting the same bug and nobody fixes it.
label: complaint

label: complaint

text: This is the third time my data has disappeared from the dashboard.
label: complaint

text: My issue was closed without any resolution, which is frustrating.
label: complaint

text: The new update made the interface much harder to use.
label: complaint

text: I feel cheated by how your pricing was communicated.
label: complaint

text: I am disappointed and considering switching to another vendor.
